PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''Single quoted $var string'')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''test'')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"Double ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' quoted ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' string with ')
      PsiPuppetInterpolatedBlockImpl(INTERPOLATED_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(VAR_INTERPOLATION_START)('${')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('hiera')
          PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
            PsiElement(()('(')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING)('"http_port"')
            PsiElement())(')')
        PsiElement(VAR_INTERPOLATION_END)('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)(' expression "')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiErrorElement:Unknown tokens
    PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
  PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
    PsiElement(()('(')
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('SINGLE')
    PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('single')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiErrorElement:'$' unexpected
    PsiElement(ANY_CHAR)('$')
  PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
    PsiElement({)('{')
    PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('var')
      PsiErrorElement:'(', '=>', CONSUMES, PRODUCES or '[' expected, got '}'
        <empty list>
    PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('quoted')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')

    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('heredoc')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionRelationImpl(EXPRESSION_RELATION)
      PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(NAME)('with')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiErrorElement:'!=', '!~', '%', '(', '*', '+', '-', '/', <, <<, <=, '==', '=~', '>', '>=', '>>', CONSUMES, PRODUCES, '[', and, in, or or '{' expected, got '$'
        PsiElement(ANY_CHAR)('$')
  PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
    PsiElement({)('{')
    PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
      PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
